goal: Remove the remaining docs and example API drift around runtime, MCP, ResponseAPI, and node-only surfaces.
successCriteria: README, COOKBOOK, tutorial, and examples no longer contain known stale API patterns or misleading import paths.
Docs and examples reflect the current runtime mainline, QiniuMCPServer truth, and ResponseAPI official/deferred split.
Focused verification extends docs drift checks or smoke paths so the cleaned examples do not regress silently.
touchedSurfaces: docs verification scripts and smoke checks
DX wording for runtime, MCP, ResponseAPI, and node-only surfaces
explicitlyOutOfScope: Changing production runtime behavior only to match stale docs
Rewriting the full docs IA or template system
Adding new product capabilities outside the documented current surface
integrationPrerequisites: Wave B foundation/export-coverage-guard is integrated on codex/vnext-integration as 23e8fb9.
Runtime, node-integrations, and cloud-surface packages remain the source of truth for their contracts; docs must follow those contracts.

liveVerifyStatus.reason: This package cleans docs and examples and relies on local smoke coverage rather than live credentials.
